scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'if [ -z "${JAVA_HOME:-}" ]; then if [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home/bin/java ]; then export JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home; elif [ -x /opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home/bin/java ]; then export JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home; fi; fi; if [ -n "${JAVA_HOME:-}" ]; then export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; fi; npm run dev:db && until (echo > /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5432) >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; cd backend && sbt -batch clean run'
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: bash -lc 'until curl -sf -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{}" http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/catalogapi >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; npm run dev --prefix frontend'
